name: Sabaki River Flood Management Plan
blocking_factor: Cross-county jurisdiction — Sabaki flows through Tana River and Kilifi counties
notes: River flows through two counties. Neither has adopted a management plan. WRMA produced study 2018; not gazetted by either county.

name: Malindi Coastal Erosion and Flood Bund
blocking_factor: Environmental impact concerns from marine tourism operators
notes: Bund design complete. Tourism lobby objected to visual impact. EIA appeal ongoing since 2021.

name: Mambrui Riparian Settlement Clearance
blocking_factor: Political resistance — settlement pre-dates county government
column12: 400 structures within 30m of Sabaki. No enforcement action since survey.

name: Malindi Town Stormwater
notes: Main drainage channels cleared and widened 2022. Secondary network not addressed. Beach road flooding unresolved.

name: Coastal Early Warning (Sabaki + Tidal)
notes: Design complete. Combines river gauge with tidal data. Budget approved 2022 but not released to KMD. Procurement not commenced.
